# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub "my-bucket-${AWS::Region}"
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Suspended
      LifecycleConfiguration:
        Rules:
          - ID: BackupRule
            Status: Disabled

  S3Policy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: s3-policy
      Roles:
        - !Ref S3Role
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowS3Access
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
          -
            Sid: DenyCloudStorageSecurity
            Effect: Deny
            NotAction:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:DeleteObject
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}/*"

  S3Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - s3.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        -
          PolicyName: S3Policy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              -
                Sid: AllowS3Access
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${S3Bucket}"
